title: 小红书教程步骤图
prompt_template: An infographic-style tutorial cover for Xiaohongshu, 3:4 vertical format. Title at top: "{tutorial_title}" in bold sans-serif. Below the title: {step_count} numbered circular badges (1, 2, 3, 4, 5) arranged vertically, each badge containing a small icon representing the step ({step_icons}). To the right of each badge: a short step description in clean Chinese typography. Background: soft cream color (#FDF8F0) with subtle decorative elements. Style: minimal, modern, easy to scan, educational infographic aesthetic, 1024x1024.
